disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several weeks of burning/gnawing upper-abdominal pain that comes on shortly after eating, with early satiety, night-time waking and unintentional weight loss of about 4 kg
trigger_question_examples: How long has the stomach pain been going on and what is it like?
Have you noticed any change in your appetite or weight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The burning has been there for about six weeks — it comes on soon after I eat and wakes me at night. I've been getting full very fast and I've lost about 4 kilos without trying.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: One episode tonight of vomiting dark, grainy 'coffee-ground' material
trigger_question_examples: What did the vomit look like?
Have you brought up anything dark or bloody?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Tonight I vomited once and it looked like wet coffee grounds — dark and grainy, not like normal food.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Passage of black, tarry, foul-smelling stool (melaena) earlier the same day
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your bowel motions?
Have your stools been black or tarry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — earlier today I passed a really black, tarry, awful-smelling stool. It wasn't normal at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound lightheadedness and near-fainting on standing, with weakness — patient-reportable proxy for haemodynamic compromise
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint, especially when you stand up?
Do you feel weak or like you might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I try to sit up or stand I go really lightheaded and feel like I'll pass out. I'm too weak to walk.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Untreated past positive Helicobacter pylori test; denies NSAID use; on no regular medications
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever been tested for the stomach ulcer bacteria, Helicobacter?
Do you take any anti-inflammatory painkillers like ibuprofen or aspirin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Years ago a test said I had that Helicobacter stomach bug but I never got treated for it. I don't take any regular medicines and I haven't been using anti-inflammatory painkillers.
